#compdef vrk

_vrk() {
    local -a commands
    commands=(
        'bar:do bar things'
        'foo:do foo things'
    )

    _arguments -C \
        '1:command:->command' \
        '*::arg:->args'

    case $state in
    command)
        _describe -t commands 'vrk tools' commands
        ;;
    args)
        case $words[1] in
        bar)
            _arguments \
                '--verbose[increase verbosity]' \
                '--quiet[suppress output]' \
                '-q[suppress output]'
            ;;
        foo)
            _arguments \
                '--json[emit JSON]' \
                '-j[emit JSON]' \
                '--count[number of items]' \
                '-n[number of items]'
            ;;
        esac
        ;;
    esac
}

_vrk "$@"
